# Eswatini Administrative Divisions — Full Reference

> Last updated: 2026-05-27. License: CC-BY-4.0.

## Per-Region Data Files

- [Hhohho](https://github.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/hhohho-sz1.txt) — 14 tinkhundlas
- [Lubombo](https://github.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/lubombo-sz4.txt) — 11 tinkhundlas
- [Manzini](https://github.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/manzini-sz2.txt) — 16 tinkhundlas
- [Shiselweni](https://github.com/open-admin-data/eswatini-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/shiselweni-sz3.txt) — 14 tinkhundlas

## Summary

| Region | Tinkhundlas | 
|---|---|
| Hhohho | 14 | 
| Lubombo | 11 | 
| Manzini | 16 | 
| Shiselweni | 14 |
